title: Create Styled Scanner
description: Create-Styled textures for the Scannable mod!
body:
A Create-Styled Tempad for the [Scannable Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/scannable)!

Optionally, if you have a mod that supports CIT textures (CITResewn, Optifine), you can rename a Scanner to "Overgrown Scanner" to get an overgrown version of the texture!
